title: deep in the garden
content:
deep in the garden
behind sadness
and vast madness
we smile
black holes
we smile
cracked teeth

deep in the garden
vines lose grip
so does he
on you
and me

who played the trick on who
when the cards topple
when the trees fall
and reality shatters
but not a soul of the couple left to hear it
does it make a sound when it explodes
were strings being pulled from behind curtains
or right in front of my face
context: From document: deep in the garden
